Notice Of Motion For Discharge And Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF T.D. SERVICE COMPANY's Motion For Discharge And Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs is Off Calendar in Department 302 only. The motion is to be heard in department 501 on the same date and at the same time. That department handles all foreclosure related matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; not reported. (D302)

Plaintiff'S Motion For Discharge And Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Lawrence J. Dreyfuss for Plaintiff T.D. Service Company the moving party appears by Court Call.
No appearance by the opposing party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Discharge and Award of Attorneys Fees and Costs in the amount of $4,193.45 is GRANTED as requested. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
